[2018-02-14 16:58] kaiasky (kaia): What do people think about something like:
[2018-02-14 17:02] kaiasky (kaia): Overclock antenna:
Lifespan 1, produce 1 gold for every drone you gave. Give all your drones exhaust 1.
[2018-02-14 17:02] kaiasky (kaia): (could be phrased as a spell too)
[2018-02-14 17:03] kaiasky (kaia): Probably supply 1 to keep things simple
[2018-02-14 17:07] kaiasky (kaia): The idea is just you get your money now instead of next turn. Since inflation, that's good. But also it requires a good judgment call because you're getting no money next turn and need to defend enough for two turns. And since the inflation rate generally goes up as time goes on, holding on to your overclock could be a good idea. Also, in breachproof strategies, it can be worth it to completely give up defense and get one extra turn of econ in before your drones are wiped

[2018-02-28 23:05] steel0229e (Steel): The problem with an overpriced engineer is that in early game you get zero block value from them so they are just very inefficient and take up extra resources that could be drones. You never want to have more defence on the board than necessary, this is also a big downside of early engineers that don't get any value until many turns later. Drones produce gold and can block, so a drone that mines for a turn and then blocks already payed for its value. messages.author: steel0229e
messages.content: The problem with an overpriced engineer is that in early game you get zero block value from them so they are just very inefficient and take up extra resources that could be drones. You never want to have more defence on the board than necessary, this is also a big downside of early engineers that don't get any value until many turns later. Drones produce gold and can block, so a drone that mines for a turn and then blocks already payed for its value. In the late game selling your overpriced engi for gold would suck because at that stage you already need defence more than gold. In its current form your unit is the weakest unit in the game.
